name: Microsoft Office Integration
description: Open and edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents directly with Microsoft Office. Supports Base64 documents from SQLite database.

routes.description: Open a document in Microsoft Office

tools.name: office_open_document
tools.description: Open a document with Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, or PowerPoint)

tools.name: office_save_document
tools.description: Save document changes back to Base64 for database storage

tools.name: office_list_recent
tools.description: List recently opened documents with their sync status

tools.name: office_register_protocol
tools.description: Check synth:// protocol status (registration handled by central host app)

components.name: OfficeLauncher
components.description: Document launcher with Office application buttons

components.name: DocumentSync
components.description: Document sync status and management panel
